patches.description: Removes pairip components from the manifest and replaces the Application class with AlarmyApp to prevent license checks from running at startup.
patches.name: Bypass pairip license verification

patches.description: Patches LicenseContentProvider.onCreate() to return immediately without creating a LicenseClient, preventing the first license check entry point.
patches.name: Disable pairip content provider

patches.description: Patches LicenseClient.startErrorDialogActivity() and handleError() to return immediately, preventing error dialogs.
patches.name: Disable pairip error dialog

patches.description: Patches LicenseActivity.onStart() to finish immediately, closing the activity if it is somehow launched.
patches.name: Disable pairip license activity

patches.description: Patches LicenseClient.initializeLicenseCheck() to return immediately, preventing Google Play license verification.
patches.name: Disable pairip license check

patches.description: Patches LicenseClient.startPaywallActivity() to return immediately, preventing the 'Get this app from Play' redirect.
patches.name: Disable pairip paywall

patches.description: Patches LicenseResponseHelper.validateResponse() to return immediately, causing any license check that gets through to be treated as valid.
patches.name: Disable pairip response validation

patches.description: Patches SignatureCheck.verifyIntegrity() to return immediately, preventing APK signature tampering detection.
patches.name: Disable pairip signature check

patches.description: Patches VMRunner.<clinit>() to return immediately, preventing libpairipcore.so from loading. The native library's JNI_OnLoad runs background integrity checks that detect APK modifications and trigger the paywall independently of the Java-side checks.
patches.name: Disable pairip VM load

patches.description: Bypasses ad-removal premium checks by forcing PremiumState.isRemoveAdPremium() to always return true.
patches.name: Remove ads

patches.description: Bypasses premium checks by forcing PremiumState.isPremium() to always return true.
patches.name: Unlock Pro subscription
